ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data was collected */,
  "flu_cases" INTEGER /* Number of influenza cases reported in the week */,
  "flu_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of influenza-related deaths reported in the week */,
  "flu_percent" REAL /* Percentage of influenza cases relative to the total population */,
  "hospi_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate (percentage of the population hospitalized due to influenza) */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population tested for influenza */,
  "test_results" INTEGER /* Number of influenza tests conducted in the week */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive influenza test results in the week */,
  "vac_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered in the week */,
  "vaccination_coverage" TEXT /* Description of the vaccination coverage (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used (e.g., flu shot, nasal spray) */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the health data (e.g., CDC, state health department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter state code (e.g., AL for Alabama) */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (people per square mile) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, Midwest, South, West) */,
  "state_governor" TEXT /* Name of the state governor */,
  "public_health_budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget for public health in the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the state's public health department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to user_roles table */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the health data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the health data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination program */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the program is conducted */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "target_population" INTEGER /* Target population for the program */,
  "vaccines_administered" INTEGER /* Number of vaccines administered during the program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "program_cost" INTEGER /* Total cost of the program */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the program (e.g., federal, state, private) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_effectiveness" REAL /* Measured effectiveness of the program (e.g., reduction in flu cases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_programs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., public health official, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
